TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Tay-san (kamu nu Hulam: ś≥įŚĪĪ) u kacudu. kungku itini i cacay a malebut walu a lasubu walu a bataan a mihcaan tu nikudan, Fa-cuo a dadipasan idaw ku cacaya a balunga mabelin, balungaay a tale acawaan idaw kuni laday tu lutungan a tatamaan nu wawa milaliw tuni katuduhan nu balungan, malikid tayda i kacaledesan nu kilakilangan caaya kaw kakatinengan a subalan (nidateng nuheni i Si-fa a dadipasan). nina taleacawaan u liwan nuni katuduhan nu balunga ku sapisanga tu luma i kilangan, pasu tatamaan a wawa itida namin i pabaw nu kilang a mueneng. nika, caay ka tenes nina taleacawan kalaten nu ma'desay a lukedaw mapatay. duma satu, u mililiday ci Ke-ca (Kerchak, Śď•śü•) tu ungay a binacadan aci tatanaan a ungay ci Ka-na' idaw ku wawa nuheni masasusungaay namin, idaw ku cacaya a labi yayuwawa a ungay milikemed milaliw a tahekal, sadikuday maadih nu lukedaw kalathan mapatay. malalum henay ci Ka-na' makatengil tu tatamaan a angic duducen nida ku angic matepa i kilang nisangaan tu luma', amica nani debungantu nu lukedaw, nika malaheci nida lada han nida kina tatamaan a wawa miliyas tina lumaan, laday han nida tayda i ungayungayan cinida tu ku pahabaya. amica ci Ke-ca (Kerchak, Śď•śü•) caay pihang cinidaan, nika ci Ka-na' pacicisa manglay mibalaki cinidaan, pangangan han cinida ci Tay-san . kanahatu ci Tay-san milihida tu i kilakilangan nanay a aadupan atu ungay a malecabay, u wayway nida atu ungay caay kalecad, nikataydaan nida katuud kuma lingesan tu cinidaan atu mibahbah. (Terk)ŤąáŚ§ßŤĪ°šłĻšłĻ(Tantor). Tay-san itini i kilakilangan tusa ku sakapahay nida a cabay ungay ci Tuo-tuo (Terk, śČėśČė) atu zu ci Tan-tan (Tantor, šłĻšłĻ). nikudan, Tay-san maadih nida ku udip nida caay kaw sacabayan ku ungauy a binacadan, kyu mangalay misa duma tu kawawan misanga cida tu sakalalebu a cancanan atu sapibihekacan a tuud, balaki satu taneng cinida tuni sangaan a tuud sapipatay tu lukedawan, kyu kasingalihan ni Ke-ca (Kerchak, Śď•śü•) atu kasikadan. śúČšłÄŚ§©, . idaw ku cacaya a demiadan, namaka Iing-kuo mitahaway a tademaw makatukuh i ungayungayan anikaudipan a kitidaan, mitahaway a tademaw idaw ku cacay mamiadup a tademaw ci Ke'-li-tun , Pu'-ciao-suo atu tataynaan a wawa nida ci Cen-ni . nipidangan, ci Cen-ni caay pihamaw miliyas tu kaput, lalabaen nu katuuday a ungay. Tay-san maadih nida taydan nida miala, maadih nida ci Cen-ni mahida aku sakalecad: u tademaw. Cen-ni nikudan satu ladayen nida ci Tay-san milihida tu mitahaway a kaputan, ci Pu'-ciasuo (Professor Porter atu ci Ke-litun misakapah ci Tay-san nan, nuayawan mikinkiw kita ci Tan-san nan nui naiay nu tademaw hican nida maudip, nikuda a hican numita papililit ci Tan-san nan mililit tayda i ungaya a luma', kiya taneng pataluma tu ungay i Ingkuo . amica ci Ke-ca (Kerchak, Śď•śü•) pataayaw tu kamu ci Tay-san nan piadihi tu tademaw haw, nika ci Tay-san caay pisengal tayda ci Pu'-ciasuo (Professor Porter a kitidaan atu ci Cen-ni yan minanam tunu kitakitay a ingu, tu masasumidang atu ci Cen-ni . nika, ci Ke'-li-tun hican nida miyukiw ci Tay-san papatayda mikilim tu ungayan caay pihangen ci Tay-san , sisa ci Tay-san mabiyalaw anu ladayen numaku ku tademaw tayda i luma nu ungay, ci Ke-ca (Kerchak, Śď•śü•) a miedis tunuhenian mitahaway a balunga taynitu militemuh tunuhenian a pataluma' i Ingkuo , ci Ke-litun sakamu hannida ci Tay-san anu taneng pataydan numisu ci Cen-ni miadih tu ungay sa, ci Cen-ni aitini satu i subal acaay tu kataluma' i lngkuo . sisa ci Tay-san mihang ladayen nida kumitahaway a tademaw tayda i aenengan nu ungan. Tuo-tuo (Terk atu ci Tan-tan (Tantor imahini papatahekalen ci ke-ca (Kerchak, Śď•śü•) patayda i duma a kakitidaan, matalaw amiedis tu tademaw. Pu'-ciasuo (Professor Porter atu ci Cen-ni makaadih tu ungan tanu namuhsa, masasalama' kunuheni, nika ci Ke-ca (Kerchak, Śď•śü•) bahal sa taluma', makaadih tu tademaw mapatay nu linges, bahbahen nida ku nuheni tu ungayungayan, taw mapatay nu linges tu wayway ni Tay-san . nikudan satu, ci Ka-na' latayen ni Tay-san pataluma' i nalumaan nu babalaki nida i kilang a luma', sakamuen ci Tay-sanan tu tada nikaudip a kawaw nida, paadihan nida ku sasing ci nida. amica caay kanamuh makaadih tunipiliyas ni Tay-san , nika ci Ka-na' sakamu hannida ci Tay-san anu mangalay kisu sa, sakamuhan cinida pilatayi ci Cen-ni an taluma' i tademawan a kitakit, itida ci Tay-san akay kamuhan nu tademaw. ci Tay-san kyu pabalucu atu ci Cen-ni miliyas tu subalan, ku tapabaw sa i balunga lalebuan ni Ke'-litun a tademaw, dakepen han cinida pululen i suku nu balunga. namakayinay a nisulitan
S.PHON: taj-san (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: **) u ka ¶udu. kuŇčku itini i ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut war~…ĺu a r~…ĺasubu war~…ĺu a bataan a mińß ¶aan tu nikudan, fa- ¶uo a dadipasan idaw ku ¶a ¶aja a bar~…ĺuŇča mab…ôr~…ĺin, bar~…ĺuŇčaaj a tar~…ĺ…ô a ¶awaan idaw kuni r~…ĺadaj tu r~…ĺutuŇčan a tatamaan nu wawa mir~…ĺar~…ĺiw tuni katuduńßan nu bar~…ĺuŇčan, mar~…ĺikid tajda i ka ¶ar~…ĺ…ôd…ôsan nu kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan ¶aaja kaw kakatin…ôŇčan a subar~…ĺan (nidat…ôŇč nuńß…ôni i si-fa a dadipasan). nina tar~…ĺ…ôa ¶awaan u r~…ĺiwan nuni katuduńßan nu bar~…ĺuŇča ku sapisaŇča tu r~…ĺuma i kir~…ĺaŇčan, pasu tatamaan a wawa itida namin i pabaw nu kir~…ĺaŇč a mu…ôn…ôŇč. nika, ¶aaj ka t…ôn…ôs nina tar~…ĺ…ôa ¶awan kar~…ĺat…ôn nu ma Ē~ °d…ôsaj a r~…ĺuk…ôdaw mapataj. duma satu, u mir~…ĺir~…ĺidaj ¶i k…ô- ¶a (k…ôr ¶ńßak, **) tu uŇčaj a bina ¶adan a ¶i tatanaan a uŇčaj ¶i ka-na Ē~ ° idaw ku wawa nuńß…ôni masasusuŇčaaj namin, idaw ku ¶a ¶aja a r~…ĺabi jajuwawa a uŇčaj mir~…ĺik…ôm…ôd mir~…ĺar~…ĺiw a tańß…ôkar~…ĺ, sadikudaj maadińß nu r~…ĺuk…ôdaw kar~…ĺatńßan mapataj. mar~…ĺar~…ĺum ńß…ônaj ¶i ka-na Ē~ ° makat…ôŇčir~…ĺ tu tatamaan a aŇči ¶ dudu ¶…ôn nida ku aŇči ¶ mat…ôpa i kir~…ĺaŇč nisaŇčaan tu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, ami ¶a nani d…ôbuŇčantu nu r~…ĺuk…ôdaw, nika mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i nida r~…ĺada ńßan nida kina tatamaan a wawa mir~…ĺijas tina r~…ĺumaan, r~…ĺadaj ńßan nida tajda i uŇčajuŇčajan ¶inida tu ku pańßabaja. ami ¶a ¶i k…ô- ¶a (k…ôr ¶ńßak, **) ¶aaj pińßaŇč ¶inidaan, nika ¶i ka-na Ē~ ° pa ¶i ¶isa maŇčr~…ĺaj mibar~…ĺaki ¶inidaan, paŇčaŇčan ńßan ¶inida ¶i taj-san . kanańßatu ¶i taj-san mir~…ĺińßida tu i kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan nanaj a aadupan atu uŇčaj a mar~…ĺ…ô ¶abaj, u wajwaj nida atu uŇčaj ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad, nikatajdaan nida katuud kuma r~…ĺiŇč…ôsan tu ¶inidaan atu mibańßbańß. (t…ôrk)*****(tantor). taj-san itini i kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan tusa ku sakapańßaj nida a ¶abaj uŇčaj ¶i tuo-tuo (t…ôrk, **) atu zu ¶i tan-tan (tantor, **). nikudan, taj-san maadińß nida ku udip nida ¶aaj kaw sa ¶abajan ku uŇčauj a bina ¶adan, kju maŇčar~…ĺaj misa duma tu kawawan misaŇča ¶ida tu sakar~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôbu a ¶an ¶anan atu sapibińß…ôka ¶an a tuud, bar~…ĺaki satu tan…ôŇč ¶inida tuni saŇčaan a tuud sapipataj tu r~…ĺuk…ôdawan, kju kasiŇčar~…ĺińßan ni k…ô- ¶a (k…ôr ¶ńßak, **) atu kasikadan. ***, . idaw ku ¶a ¶aja a d…ômiadan, namaka iiŇč-kuo mitańßawaj a tad…ômaw makatukuńß i uŇčajuŇčajan anikaudipan a kitidaan, mitańßawaj a tad…ômaw idaw ku ¶a ¶aj mamiadup a tad…ômaw ¶i k…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺi-tun , pu Ē~ °- ¶iao-suo atu tatajnaan a wawa nida ¶i ¶…ôn-ni . nipidaŇčan, ¶i ¶…ôn-ni ¶aaj pińßamaw mir~…ĺijas tu kaput, r~…ĺar~…ĺaba…ôn nu katuudaj a uŇčaj. taj-san maadińß nida tajdan nida miar~…ĺa, maadińß nida ¶i ¶…ôn-ni mańßida aku sakar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad: u tad…ômaw. ¶…ôn-ni nikudan satu r~…ĺadaj…ôn nida ¶i taj-san mir~…ĺińßida tu mitańßawaj a kaputan, ¶i pu Ē~ °- ¶iasuo (prof…ôssor port…ôr atu ¶i k…ô-r~…ĺitun misakapańß ¶i taj-san nan, nuajawan mikinkiw kita ¶i tan-san nan nui naiaj nu tad…ômaw ńßi ¶an nida maudip, nikuda a ńßi ¶an numita papir~…ĺir~…ĺit ¶i tan-san nan mir~…ĺir~…ĺit tajda i uŇčaja a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, kija tan…ôŇč patar~…ĺuma tu uŇčaj i iŇčkuo . ami ¶a ¶i k…ô- ¶a (k…ôr ¶ńßak, **) pataajaw tu kamu ¶i taj-san nan piadińßi tu tad…ômaw ńßaw, nika ¶i taj-san ¶aaj pis…ôŇčar~…ĺ tajda ¶i pu Ē~ °- ¶iasuo (prof…ôssor port…ôr a kitidaan atu ¶i ¶…ôn-ni jan minanam tunu kitakitaj a iŇču, tu masasumidaŇč atu ¶i ¶…ôn-ni . nika, ¶i k…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺi-tun ńßi ¶an nida mijukiw ¶i taj-san papatajda mikir~…ĺim tu uŇčajan ¶aaj pińßaŇč…ôn ¶i taj-san , sisa ¶i taj-san mabijar~…ĺaw anu r~…ĺadaj…ôn numaku ku tad…ômaw tajda i r~…ĺuma nu uŇčaj, ¶i k…ô- ¶a (k…ôr ¶ńßak, **) a mi…ôdis tunuńß…ônian mitańßawaj a bar~…ĺuŇča tajnitu mir~…ĺit…ômuńß tunuńß…ônian a patar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° i iŇčkuo , ¶i k…ô-r~…ĺitun sakamu ńßannida ¶i taj-san anu tan…ôŇč patajdan numisu ¶i ¶…ôn-ni miadińß tu uŇčaj sa, ¶i ¶…ôn-ni aitini satu i subar~…ĺ a ¶aaj tu katar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° i r~…ĺŇčkuo . sisa ¶i taj-san mińßaŇč r~…ĺadaj…ôn nida kumitańßawaj a tad…ômaw tajda i a…ôn…ôŇčan nu uŇčan. tuo-tuo (t…ôrk atu ¶i tan-tan (tantor imańßini papatańß…ôkar~…ĺ…ôn ¶i k…ô- ¶a (k…ôr ¶ńßak, **) patajda i duma a kakitidaan, matar~…ĺaw ami…ôdis tu tad…ômaw. pu Ē~ °- ¶iasuo (prof…ôssor port…ôr atu ¶i ¶…ôn-ni makaadińß tu uŇčan tanu namuńßsa, masasar~…ĺama Ē~ ° kunuńß…ôni, nika ¶i k…ô- ¶a (k…ôr ¶ńßak, **) bańßar~…ĺ sa tar~…ĺuma Ē~ °, makaadińß tu tad…ômaw mapataj nu r~…ĺiŇč…ôs, bańßbańß…ôn nida ku nuńß…ôni tu uŇčajuŇčajan, taw mapataj nu r~…ĺiŇč…ôs tu wajwaj ni taj-san . nikudan satu, ¶i ka-na Ē~ ° r~…ĺataj…ôn ni taj-san patar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° i nar~…ĺumaan nu babar~…ĺaki nida i kir~…ĺaŇč a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, sakamu…ôn ¶i taj-sanan tu tada nikaudip a kawaw nida, paadińßan nida ku sasiŇč ¶i nida. ami ¶a ¶aaj kanamuńß makaadińß tunipir~…ĺijas ni taj-san , nika ¶i ka-na Ē~ ° sakamu ńßannida ¶i taj-san anu maŇčar~…ĺaj kisu sa, sakamuńßan ¶inida pir~…ĺataji ¶i ¶…ôn-ni an tar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° i tad…ômawan a kitakit, itida ¶i taj-san akaj kamuńßan nu tad…ômaw. ¶i taj-san kju pabar~…ĺu ¶u atu ¶i ¶…ôn-ni mir~…ĺijas tu subar~…ĺan, ku tapabaw sa i bar~…ĺuŇča r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôbuan ni k…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺitun a tad…ômaw, dak…ôp…ôn ńßan ¶inida pur~…ĺur~…ĺ…ôn i suku nu bar~…ĺuŇča. namakajinaj a nisur~…ĺitan
S.FORM: Tay-san (kamu nu Hulam: ś≥įŚĪĪ) u kacudu. kungku itini i cacay a malebut walu a lasubu walu a bataan a mihcaan tu nikudan, Fa-cuo a dadipasan idaw ku cacaya a balunga mabelin, balungaay a tale acawaan idaw kuni laday tu lutungan a tatamaan nu wawa milaliw tuni katuduhan nu balungan, malikid tayda i kacaledesan nu kilakilangan caaya kaw kakatinengan a subalan (nidateng nuheni i Si-fa a dadipasan). nina taleacawaan u liwan nuni katuduhan nu balunga ku sapisanga tu luma i kilangan, pasu tatamaan a wawa itida namin i pabaw nu kilang a mueneng. nika, caay ka tenes nina taleacawan kalaten nu ma'desay a lukedaw mapatay. duma satu, u mililiday ci Ke-ca (Kerchak, Śď•śü•) tu ungay a binacadan aci tatanaan a ungay ci Ka-na' idaw ku wawa nuheni masasusungaay namin, idaw ku cacaya a labi yayuwawa a ungay milikemed milaliw a tahekal, sadikuday maadih nu lukedaw kalathan mapatay. malalum henay ci Ka-na' makatengil tu tatamaan a angic duducen nida ku angic matepa i kilang nisangaan tu luma', amica nani debungantu nu lukedaw, nika malaheci nida lada han nida kina tatamaan a wawa miliyas tina lumaan, laday han nida tayda i ungayungayan cinida tu ku pahabaya. amica ci Ke-ca (Kerchak, Śď•śü•) caay pihang cinidaan, nika ci Ka-na' pacicisa manglay mibalaki cinidaan, pangangan han cinida ci Tay-san . kanahatu ci Tay-san milihida tu i kilakilangan nanay a aadupan atu ungay a malecabay, u wayway nida atu ungay caay kalecad, nikataydaan nida katuud kuma lingesan tu cinidaan atu mibahbah. (Terk)ŤąáŚ§ßŤĪ°šłĻšłĻ(Tantor). Tay-san itini i kilakilangan tusa ku sakapahay nida a cabay ungay ci Tuo-tuo (Terk, śČėśČė) atu zu ci Tan-tan (Tantor, šłĻšłĻ). nikudan, Tay-san maadih nida ku udip nida caay kaw sacabayan ku ungauy a binacadan, kyu mangalay misa duma tu kawawan misanga cida tu sakalalebu a cancanan atu sapibihekacan a tuud, balaki satu taneng cinida tuni sangaan a tuud sapipatay tu lukedawan, kyu kasingalihan ni Ke-ca (Kerchak, Śď•śü•) atu kasikadan. śúČšłÄŚ§©, . idaw ku cacaya a demiadan, namaka Iing-kuo mitahaway a tademaw makatukuh i ungayungayan anikaudipan a kitidaan, mitahaway a tademaw idaw ku cacay mamiadup a tademaw ci Ke'-li-tun , Pu'-ciao-suo atu tataynaan a wawa nida ci Cen-ni . nipidangan, ci Cen-ni caay pihamaw miliyas tu kaput, lalabaen nu katuuday a ungay. Tay-san maadih nida taydan nida miala, maadih nida ci Cen-ni mahida aku sakalecad: u tademaw. Cen-ni nikudan satu ladayen nida ci Tay-san milihida tu mitahaway a kaputan, ci Pu'-ciasuo (Professor Porter atu ci Ke-litun misakapah ci Tay-san nan, nuayawan mikinkiw kita ci Tan-san nan nui naiay nu tademaw hican nida maudip, nikuda a hican numita papililit ci Tan-san nan mililit tayda i ungaya a luma', kiya taneng pataluma tu ungay i Ingkuo . amica ci Ke-ca (Kerchak, Śď•śü•) pataayaw tu kamu ci Tay-san nan piadihi tu tademaw haw, nika ci Tay-san caay pisengal tayda ci Pu'-ciasuo (Professor Porter a kitidaan atu ci Cen-ni yan minanam tunu kitakitay a ingu, tu masasumidang atu ci Cen-ni . nika, ci Ke'-li-tun hican nida miyukiw ci Tay-san papatayda mikilim tu ungayan caay pihangen ci Tay-san , sisa ci Tay-san mabiyalaw anu ladayen numaku ku tademaw tayda i luma nu ungay, ci Ke-ca (Kerchak, Śď•śü•) a miedis tunuhenian mitahaway a balunga taynitu militemuh tunuhenian a pataluma' i Ingkuo , ci Ke-litun sakamu hannida ci Tay-san anu taneng pataydan numisu ci Cen-ni miadih tu ungay sa, ci Cen-ni aitini satu i subal acaay tu kataluma' i lngkuo . sisa ci Tay-san mihang ladayen nida kumitahaway a tademaw tayda i aenengan nu ungan. Tuo-tuo (Terk atu ci Tan-tan (Tantor imahini papatahekalen ci ke-ca (Kerchak, Śď•śü•) patayda i duma a kakitidaan, matalaw amiedis tu tademaw. Pu'-ciasuo (Professor Porter atu ci Cen-ni makaadih tu ungan tanu namuhsa, masasalama' kunuheni, nika ci Ke-ca (Kerchak, Śď•śü•) bahal sa taluma', makaadih tu tademaw mapatay nu linges, bahbahen nida ku nuheni tu ungayungayan, taw mapatay nu linges tu wayway ni Tay-san . nikudan satu, ci Ka-na' latayen ni Tay-san pataluma' i nalumaan nu babalaki nida i kilang a luma', sakamuen ci Tay-sanan tu tada nikaudip a kawaw nida, paadihan nida ku sasing ci nida. amica caay kanamuh makaadih tunipiliyas ni Tay-san , nika ci Ka-na' sakamu hannida ci Tay-san anu mangalay kisu sa, sakamuhan cinida pilatayi ci Cen-ni an taluma' i tademawan a kitakit, itida ci Tay-san akay kamuhan nu tademaw. ci Tay-san kyu pabalucu atu ci Cen-ni miliyas tu subalan, ku tapabaw sa i balunga lalebuan ni Ke'-litun a tademaw, dakepen han cinida pululen i suku nu balunga. namakayinay a nisulitan
S.PHON: taj-san (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: **) u ka ¶udu. kuŇčku itini i ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut war~…ĺu a r~…ĺasubu war~…ĺu a bataan a mińß ¶aan tu nikudan, fa- ¶uo a dadipasan idaw ku ¶a ¶aja a bar~…ĺuŇča mab…ôr~…ĺin, bar~…ĺuŇčaaj a tar~…ĺ…ô a ¶awaan idaw kuni r~…ĺadaj tu r~…ĺutuŇčan a tatamaan nu wawa mir~…ĺar~…ĺiw tuni katuduńßan nu bar~…ĺuŇčan, mar~…ĺikid tajda i ka ¶ar~…ĺ…ôd…ôsan nu kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan ¶aaja kaw kakatin…ôŇčan a subar~…ĺan (nidat…ôŇč nuńß…ôni i si-fa a dadipasan). nina tar~…ĺ…ôa ¶awaan u r~…ĺiwan nuni katuduńßan nu bar~…ĺuŇča ku sapisaŇča tu r~…ĺuma i kir~…ĺaŇčan, pasu tatamaan a wawa itida namin i pabaw nu kir~…ĺaŇč a mu…ôn…ôŇč. nika, ¶aaj ka t…ôn…ôs nina tar~…ĺ…ôa ¶awan kar~…ĺat…ôn nu ma Ē~ °d…ôsaj a r~…ĺuk…ôdaw mapataj. duma satu, u mir~…ĺir~…ĺidaj ¶i k…ô- ¶a (k…ôr ¶ńßak, **) tu uŇčaj a bina ¶adan a ¶i tatanaan a uŇčaj ¶i ka-na Ē~ ° idaw ku wawa nuńß…ôni masasusuŇčaaj namin, idaw ku ¶a ¶aja a r~…ĺabi jajuwawa a uŇčaj mir~…ĺik…ôm…ôd mir~…ĺar~…ĺiw a tańß…ôkar~…ĺ, sadikudaj maadińß nu r~…ĺuk…ôdaw kar~…ĺatńßan mapataj. mar~…ĺar~…ĺum ńß…ônaj ¶i ka-na Ē~ ° makat…ôŇčir~…ĺ tu tatamaan a aŇči ¶ dudu ¶…ôn nida ku aŇči ¶ mat…ôpa i kir~…ĺaŇč nisaŇčaan tu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, ami ¶a nani d…ôbuŇčantu nu r~…ĺuk…ôdaw, nika mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i nida r~…ĺada ńßan nida kina tatamaan a wawa mir~…ĺijas tina r~…ĺumaan, r~…ĺadaj ńßan nida tajda i uŇčajuŇčajan ¶inida tu ku pańßabaja. ami ¶a ¶i k…ô- ¶a (k…ôr ¶ńßak, **) ¶aaj pińßaŇč ¶inidaan, nika ¶i ka-na Ē~ ° pa ¶i ¶isa maŇčr~…ĺaj mibar~…ĺaki ¶inidaan, paŇčaŇčan ńßan ¶inida ¶i taj-san . kanańßatu ¶i taj-san mir~…ĺińßida tu i kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan nanaj a aadupan atu uŇčaj a mar~…ĺ…ô ¶abaj, u wajwaj nida atu uŇčaj ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad, nikatajdaan nida katuud kuma r~…ĺiŇč…ôsan tu ¶inidaan atu mibańßbańß. (t…ôrk)*****(tantor). taj-san itini i kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan tusa ku sakapańßaj nida a ¶abaj uŇčaj ¶i tuo-tuo (t…ôrk, **) atu zu ¶i tan-tan (tantor, **). nikudan, taj-san maadińß nida ku udip nida ¶aaj kaw sa ¶abajan ku uŇčauj a bina ¶adan, kju maŇčar~…ĺaj misa duma tu kawawan misaŇča ¶ida tu sakar~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôbu a ¶an ¶anan atu sapibińß…ôka ¶an a tuud, bar~…ĺaki satu tan…ôŇč ¶inida tuni saŇčaan a tuud sapipataj tu r~…ĺuk…ôdawan, kju kasiŇčar~…ĺińßan ni k…ô- ¶a (k…ôr ¶ńßak, **) atu kasikadan. ***, . idaw ku ¶a ¶aja a d…ômiadan, namaka iiŇč-kuo mitańßawaj a tad…ômaw makatukuńß i uŇčajuŇčajan anikaudipan a kitidaan, mitańßawaj a tad…ômaw idaw ku ¶a ¶aj mamiadup a tad…ômaw ¶i k…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺi-tun , pu Ē~ °- ¶iao-suo atu tatajnaan a wawa nida ¶i ¶…ôn-ni . nipidaŇčan, ¶i ¶…ôn-ni ¶aaj pińßamaw mir~…ĺijas tu kaput, r~…ĺar~…ĺaba…ôn nu katuudaj a uŇčaj. taj-san maadińß nida tajdan nida miar~…ĺa, maadińß nida ¶i ¶…ôn-ni mańßida aku sakar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad: u tad…ômaw. ¶…ôn-ni nikudan satu r~…ĺadaj…ôn nida ¶i taj-san mir~…ĺińßida tu mitańßawaj a kaputan, ¶i pu Ē~ °- ¶iasuo (prof…ôssor port…ôr atu ¶i k…ô-r~…ĺitun misakapańß ¶i taj-san nan, nuajawan mikinkiw kita ¶i tan-san nan nui naiaj nu tad…ômaw ńßi ¶an nida maudip, nikuda a ńßi ¶an numita papir~…ĺir~…ĺit ¶i tan-san nan mir~…ĺir~…ĺit tajda i uŇčaja a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, kija tan…ôŇč patar~…ĺuma tu uŇčaj i iŇčkuo . ami ¶a ¶i k…ô- ¶a (k…ôr ¶ńßak, **) pataajaw tu kamu ¶i taj-san nan piadińßi tu tad…ômaw ńßaw, nika ¶i taj-san ¶aaj pis…ôŇčar~…ĺ tajda ¶i pu Ē~ °- ¶iasuo (prof…ôssor port…ôr a kitidaan atu ¶i ¶…ôn-ni jan minanam tunu kitakitaj a iŇču, tu masasumidaŇč atu ¶i ¶…ôn-ni . nika, ¶i k…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺi-tun ńßi ¶an nida mijukiw ¶i taj-san papatajda mikir~…ĺim tu uŇčajan ¶aaj pińßaŇč…ôn ¶i taj-san , sisa ¶i taj-san mabijar~…ĺaw anu r~…ĺadaj…ôn numaku ku tad…ômaw tajda i r~…ĺuma nu uŇčaj, ¶i k…ô- ¶a (k…ôr ¶ńßak, **) a mi…ôdis tunuńß…ônian mitańßawaj a bar~…ĺuŇča tajnitu mir~…ĺit…ômuńß tunuńß…ônian a patar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° i iŇčkuo , ¶i k…ô-r~…ĺitun sakamu ńßannida ¶i taj-san anu tan…ôŇč patajdan numisu ¶i ¶…ôn-ni miadińß tu uŇčaj sa, ¶i ¶…ôn-ni aitini satu i subar~…ĺ a ¶aaj tu katar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° i r~…ĺŇčkuo . sisa ¶i taj-san mińßaŇč r~…ĺadaj…ôn nida kumitańßawaj a tad…ômaw tajda i a…ôn…ôŇčan nu uŇčan. tuo-tuo (t…ôrk atu ¶i tan-tan (tantor imańßini papatańß…ôkar~…ĺ…ôn ¶i k…ô- ¶a (k…ôr ¶ńßak, **) patajda i duma a kakitidaan, matar~…ĺaw ami…ôdis tu tad…ômaw. pu Ē~ °- ¶iasuo (prof…ôssor port…ôr atu ¶i ¶…ôn-ni makaadińß tu uŇčan tanu namuńßsa, masasar~…ĺama Ē~ ° kunuńß…ôni, nika ¶i k…ô- ¶a (k…ôr ¶ńßak, **) bańßar~…ĺ sa tar~…ĺuma Ē~ °, makaadińß tu tad…ômaw mapataj nu r~…ĺiŇč…ôs, bańßbańß…ôn nida ku nuńß…ôni tu uŇčajuŇčajan, taw mapataj nu r~…ĺiŇč…ôs tu wajwaj ni taj-san . nikudan satu, ¶i ka-na Ē~ ° r~…ĺataj…ôn ni taj-san patar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° i nar~…ĺumaan nu babar~…ĺaki nida i kir~…ĺaŇč a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, sakamu…ôn ¶i taj-sanan tu tada nikaudip a kawaw nida, paadińßan nida ku sasiŇč ¶i nida. ami ¶a ¶aaj kanamuńß makaadińß tunipir~…ĺijas ni taj-san , nika ¶i ka-na Ē~ ° sakamu ńßannida ¶i taj-san anu maŇčar~…ĺaj kisu sa, sakamuńßan ¶inida pir~…ĺataji ¶i ¶…ôn-ni an tar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° i tad…ômawan a kitakit, itida ¶i taj-san akaj kamuńßan nu tad…ômaw. ¶i taj-san kju pabar~…ĺu ¶u atu ¶i ¶…ôn-ni mir~…ĺijas tu subar~…ĺan, ku tapabaw sa i bar~…ĺuŇča r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôbuan ni k…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺitun a tad…ômaw, dak…ôp…ôn ńßan ¶inida pur~…ĺur~…ĺ…ôn i suku nu bar~…ĺuŇča. namakajinaj a nisur~…ĺitan
